title: San Millán 80/20 Session
description: 80% Z2 + 20% hard finish — San Millán's personal protocol
purpose: Aerobic base with high-intensity finish for time-efficient fitness

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Enjoy the easy minutes. Your legs have no idea what's coming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Prepare your body for quality work. Every great session starts here.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive warm-up: elevate core temperature, activate neuromuscular pathways.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Smooth breathing, easy cadence. Build gradually.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2. Also known as 'why am I even here' pace.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the aerobic engine. This is the foundation of everything.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Keep it easy. Conversational pace. Build your base.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: FTP work. Where dreams of easy rides go to die.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is where you raise the ceiling. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Threshold intervals maximize lactate steady-state power development.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Hold your power. Breathe. Focus on smooth pedaling.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your lungs will remember this. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: VO2max work raises your aerobic ceiling. Embrace the discomfort!
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Supra-threshold efforts maximize time at >90% VO2max for aerobic adaptation.
coachingNotes.MIXED: High cadence, deep breathing. This is supposed to hurt.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: FTP work. Where dreams of easy rides go to die.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is where you raise the ceiling. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Threshold intervals maximize lactate steady-state power development.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Hold your power. Breathe. Focus on smooth pedaling.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: You survived. Congratulations. Now spin the suffering out of your legs.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Great work! Spin easy and let adaptation begin.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Active recovery facilitates lactate clearance and parasympathetic activation.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Bring it down smoothly. You earned this.
